### Props

| Name                   | Type      | Required | Default | Description                                                                       |
| ---------------------- | --------- | -------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `schemaItem`           | `object`  | ✓        | —       | The full schema item (needs .properties, .required)                               |
| `loading`              | `boolean` |          | `false` | Disable state                                                                     |
| `selectedProperty`     | `string`  |          | `null`  | Currently selected property key                                                   |
| `propertiesModified`   | `boolean` |          | `false` | Whether any properties have been modified                                         |
| `originalProperties`   | `object`  |          | `\{\}`  | Original properties snapshot for modification detection                           |
| `typeOptionsForSelect` | `array`   |          | `[]`    | Type options for the inline NcSelect                                              |
| `availableSchemas`     | `array`   |          | `[]`    | Available schemas for references                                                  |
| `availableRegisters`   | `array`   |          | `[]`    | Available registers                                                               |
| `availableTagsOptions` | `array`   |          | `[]`    | Available tags for file property config                                           |
| `userGroups`           | `array`   |          | `[]`    | User groups for RBAC                                                              |
| `sortedUserGroups`     | `array`   |          | `[]`    | Filtered/sorted user groups                                                       |
| `loadingGroups`        | `boolean` |          | `false` | Whether groups are loading                                                        |
| `inheritedProperties`  | `object`  |          | `\{\}`  | Properties inherited from parent schemas (allOf) — shown as locked/read-only rows |

### Events

| Name                       | Payload | Description |
| -------------------------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `add-property`             | —       |             |
| `copy-property`            | —       |             |
| `delete-property`          | —       |             |
| `update:selected-property` | —       |             |
| `update:property-key`      | —       |             |
